message:
chore: refresh Cargo.lock for fsqlite-btree → fsqlite-func dep edge

Routine transitive lockfile update following the frankensqlite
sibling-workspace change where fsqlite-btree now pulls in
fsqlite-func directly (for CollationRegistry access inside the
collation-aware BTree key comparator).  Beads_rust depends on
fsqlite-btree transitively, so the lock graph needs to record
the new edge.

No direct dependency manifest changes on beads_rust's side.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
